text.title: lb-nginx-production Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for lb-nginx-production as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Setting worker_connections 100000 without verifying ulimit -n and kernel nofile limits.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Nginx opens file descriptors for each connection (2 per proxied connection — client and upstream). If the OS nofile limit is lower than worker_processes * worker_connections, Nginx silently drops connections at the limit. Always verify: ulimit -n returns at least 2 * worker_processes * worker_connections.

failure-mode.description: Overlapping NGINX location prefixes without explicit precedence control.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: NGINX evaluates location blocks: exact match (=) then longest prefix match then regex. Agents frequently emit overlapping prefixes like /api and /api/v1 without understanding that /api/v1 wins only because it is longer, not because of declaration order. Use = for exact matches, ^~ to prevent regex matching, or ensure prefixes are disjoint.
